query: SELECT id, description, priority, page, status, createdAt FROM changeRequests ORDER BY id DESC
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2rf57goPWjFduX1.root --database dDLjqN8avGrS9FkSAJP3wb --execute SELECT id, description, priority, page, status, createdAt FROM changeRequests ORDER BY id DESC

rows.description: chnage the email on the facebook help video to add, to duffyjamir@gmail.com
On the Facebook business access page, add the same email for the ghl admin, but put in give full access

Change the video embed on the 4th step to this, https://www.google.com/url?sa=t&source=web&rct=j&opi=89978449&url=https://www.youtube.com/watch%3Fv%3Dr9bwiFVUezE&ved=2ahUKEwjHvJCM9N-SAxWRpIkEHRa_LJMQkPEHegQIGRAB&usg=AOvVaw2ZESs3unr_GLkyDVBtoI_8 watch the video yourself then change the quick steps at the bottom so they match
On the " add us as agency admin page, put the email to add as employee@catalystmarketingco.net, first and last name can be Catalyst marketing

change the GHL page to once they mark done GHL account is made, make a manditory step 1b that is add us as agency admin, change the how to add us to agency admin yt video embed to this https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=njgC28VeUEc
, share your login details with us via the intake form or email. remove this and put add our email as a agency admin
remove Choose the plan that fits your needs (we recommend the $297/mo plan) and put choose 07 plan
Make sure a client can resume the onboarding if log back in if they leave and come back
remove the ghl login and password fields from the intake
